alt: CM Mohan Yadav of Madhya Pradesh received blessings at the ashram of the supreme saint Baba Umakant Maharaj Ji at Jai Gurudev Ashram, Ujjain, MP.
Saket Mishra had the good fortune to have the darshan and receive blessings from the saint of the time, Baba Umakant Ji Maharaj (Ujjain Ashram), at Baba Jai Gurudev Ashram, Itiathok, UP.
Honorable Home Minister Shri Amit Shah Ji, meeting Saint Baba Umakant Ji Maharaj and receiving his blessings.
